message: A Codex skill's settings block (the part at the very top of the SKILL.md, between the --- lines) does not match the Codex skill format — the name or description Codex needs to discover and present the command is missing or malformed (the exact problem is named just above). A malformed skill silently vanishes from the operator's command list rather than erroring, so it is caught at the merge. The schema is resolved through the surface catalog (the 'codex-skill' surface). These files are committed renders of the canonical .claude/skills sources: fix the source and regenerate (uv run --directory .engine --frozen -- python tools/codex_gen.py generate), never the render.
